mapper.insert: insert into astschema.class_table(file_id, class_name, is_interface, modifier, output_id, package_name) values (#{file_id}, #{className}, #{isInterface}, #{modifier}, #{outputId}, #{packageName});
insert into astschema.method_table (class_id, method_name, return_type, modifier, output_id) values (#{classId}, #{methodName}, #{returnType}, #{modifier}, #{outputId})
insert into astschema.parameter_table (method_id, param_name, param_type, position, output_id) values (#{methodId}, #{paramName}, #{paramType}, #{position}, #{outputId});

insert into astschema.dependency_table (source_class, source_method, target_class, target_method, dependency_type, output_id) values (#{sourceClass}, #{sourceMethod}, #{targetClass}, #{targetMethod}, #{dependencyType}, #{outputId})
mapper.update: update hybridanalysis.ast_error set update_time = #{updateTime} where source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId}
update hybridanalysis.ast_output set update_time =#{updateTime} where source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId}
